textPlain: Just browsing through this screams AI slop. Bold claims, judicious use of emojis, usage of agent orchestrator

If you’re looking for a non-slop OSS agent, check out OpenHands: https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands?tab=readme-ov-file(It’s written like 30% of its own code, so maybe a little slop if I’m being fair. But it’s mostly humans! Almost 400 of us now!)
